<?php namespace Aws\SageMakerRuntime; use Aws\AwsClient; /** * This client is used to interact with the **Amazon SageMaker Runtime** service. * @method \Aws\Result invokeEndpoint(array $args = []) * @method \GuzzleHttp\Promise\Promise invokeEndpointAsync(array $args = []) * @method \Aws\Result invokeEndpointAsync(array $args = []) * @method \GuzzleHttp\Promise\Promise invokeEndpointAsyncAsync(array $args = []) * @method \Aws\Result invokeEndpointWithResponseStream(array $args = []) * @method \GuzzleHttp\Promise\Promise invokeEndpointWithResponseStreamAsync(array $args = []) */ class SageMakerRuntimeClient extends AwsClient {}
